metadata.name: Mark
metadata.description: Kompaktes Interlinear-Artefakt fuer Matthaeus, Markus, Lukas und Johannes. Pro Vers werden die OpenGNT-Worttokens mit Lemma, Morphologie, Strong, Transliteration und knappen Glossen bereitgestellt.

3:21.g: He is out of His mind.

5:18.st: who had been possessed by the demons

6:31.st: they did not even have time

8:33.st: you do not have in mind

9:18.st: it throws him to the ground

9:26.lt: having thrown him into many convulsions

9:43.st: causes you to fall into sin

9:45.st: causes you to fall into sin

9:47.st: causes you to fall into sin

10:16.st: He took [the children] in His arms,

10:19.lt: you shall not bear false witness,

10:40.st: [These places belong] to those for whom

12:42.st: a small fraction of a denarius.

14:26.st: when they had sung a hymn,

15:29.st: You who are going to destroy
